data.title: Tennessee parents participate in School Choice Week with 650+ schools nationwide for K-12 education.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, on January 28, 2026, National School Choice Week kicked off, spreading awareness about selecting suitable K-12 schools for kids. Over 650 schools and groups in Tennessee are partaking in this initiative to assist parents in making informed decisions for their children's education. Celebrations are being held across the state to emphasize the importance of school choice.

data.title: Parents in Indiana consider school options during School Choice Week, with 620+ schools participating.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, National School Choice Week commenced in Indiana and nationwide, emphasizing the importance of assisting parents in selecting suitable K–12 schools for their children. Over 620 schools and organizations in Indiana are participating in this initiative, offering support and guidance to families in navigating the educational options available to them. This week serves as an opportunity for parents to explore diverse schooling choices and make informed decisions regarding their children's academic futures.

data.title: School Choice Week in Louisiana highlights over 490 participating schools helping parents find the right K-12 schools.
data.description: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, the annual National School Choice Week commenced on January 28, 2026, aiming to assist parents in selecting suitable K-12 schools for their children. Over 490 schools in the Pelican State are participating by organizing open houses as part of the initiative. Celebrations are taking place not only locally but also nationwide to emphasize the significance of choosing the right educational path for students.

data.title: School Choice Week in PA focuses on finding K-12 schools, with over 930 schools/organizations participating. #EducationOptions
data.description: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania on January 28, 2026, National School Choice Week commenced, with a focus on assisting parents in selecting suitable K–12 schools for their children. Over 930 schools and organizations throughout Pennsylvania are participating in this initiative, with activities aimed at providing families with the necessary information to make informed decisions about their children's education. This event is part of a larger nationwide effort to promote educational options and empower parents in choosing the best educational opportunities for their kids.

data.title: School Choice Week in Arkansas showcases 510+ schools for parents seeking the right K–12 education options.
data.description: In Little Rock, Arkansas, as of January 28, 2026, National School Choice Week has kicked off, aiming to assist parents in selecting suitable K–12 schools for their children. Over 510 schools and organizations in the state are actively participating in this initiative, alongside various entities nationwide.

data.title: School Choice Week in Missouri began with over 400 schools and organizations participating to help parents find the right K-12 schools for their children.
data.description: In Missouri and nationwide, National School Choice Week kicked off on January 28, 2026, with the aim of assisting parents in selecting the ideal K–12 schools for their kids. Over 400 schools and entities in Missouri are participating in this initiative.

data.title: Illinois joins National School Choice Week with 980 schools offering options for K–12 students and parents.
data.description: In Springfield, Illinois, as of January 28, 2026, National School Choice Week has commenced nationwide to aid parents in selecting suitable K–12 schools for their kids. Over 980 schools and organizations in Illinois are participating in this initiative, aiming to assist families in making informed educational decisions.

data.title: The Amlon Group acquires Mastermelt America LLC, now Amlon Sweetwater, specializing in industrial waste processing.
data.description: In Norwalk, Connecticut, on January 28, 2026, Heartwood Partners announced that The Amlon Group has completed the acquisition of Mastermelt America LLC. The newly named Amlon Sweetwater facility is focused on handling intricate industrial waste. This acquisition marks a significant development in the industry, with important implications for both companies involved.

data.title: Danaher's Q4 2025 net earnings were $1.2B, $6.8B revenue, full year earnings $3.6B, $24.6B revenue. Operating cash flow was $2.1B in Q4 and $6.4B for the full year. Non-GAAP adjusted diluted net earnings per common share increased to $2.23 in Q4 and $7.80 for full year. Company expects 3-6% core revenue growth in 2026. Conference call and webcast available for more details. Find out more at www.danaher.com.
data.description: Danaher Corporation reported its fourth quarter and full year 2025 results, with net earnings of $1.2 billion and $3.6 billion, respectively. Revenues increased by 4.5% in Q4 to $6.8 billion, and by 3.0% for the full year to $24.6 billion. Non-GAAP adjusted diluted net earnings per common share grew by 4.0% in Q4 to $2.23 and by 4.5% for the full year to $7.80. Operating cash flow was $2.1 billion in Q4 and $6.4 billion for the full year. The company highlighted new product launches in life sciences and diagnostics in 2025, driving its performance. Danaher's President, Rainer M. Blair, expressed confidence in the company's future outlook due to its diverse portfolio and strong balance sheet. The company anticipates low-single digit core revenue growth for Q1 2026 and 3% to 6% growth for the full year. Adjusted diluted net earnings per common share guidance for 2026 is expected to be in the range of $8.35 to $8.50. Danaher's global life sciences and diagnostics focus on using science and technology to improve human health, with a workforce of around 60,000 employees worldwide contributing to advancing healthcare solutions. More details and financial reconciliations can be found on Danaher's website or Benzinga.com.

data.title: Altcoins surge with double-digit gains as Bitcoin nears $90K, seeing weekly increases of 30% to 56% amid capital rotation.
data.description: As the price of Bitcoin approaches $90,000, there has been a shift of capital into alternative cryptocurrencies, leading to significant weekly gains of 30% to 56% for these altcoins.

data.title: Investment opportunity: Ocean Harvesting Technologies AB raising 1 MEUR for InfinityWEC wave energy converter development.
data.description: Ocean Harvesting Technologies AB has initiated a 1 million euros share issue spanning from 2026 to 2027. The funding will support the advancement and prototype trials of the InfinityWEC wave energy converter in two existing EU-supported partnership projects. The company is based in Gothenburg, Sweden, and Karlskrona.

data.title: CMS targets 15 high-cost drugs for negotiation, expands program to Part B medications. Savings estimated at $8.5 billion.
data.description: The U.S. CMS has chosen 15 high-cost prescription drugs for the third round of the Medicare Drug Price Negotiation Program. This marks the first time drugs reimbursed under Medicare Part B are included. Medications target conditions like cancer, psoriatic arthritis, and HIV-1. Negotiations with drugmakers are set for 2026, with new prices starting from January 1, 2028. Additionally, one previously negotiated drug will undergo a renegotiation under the initiative. This program now extends beyond Part D drugs to include Part B treatments. The agency estimates savings of $8.5 billion in covered prescription drug costs if prices from the second cycle were in effect for 2024, resulting in 36% lower spending across the selected drugs. President Trump's efforts to reduce drug costs for seniors and taxpayers are highlighted.

data.title: Blokees showcases various products at Spielwarenmesse 2026 toy fair in Shanghai, featuring an enhanced product lineup.
data.description: In Shanghai on January 28, 2026, Assembly Character Toys company Blokees showcased its growing product collection at Spielwarenmesse 2026 from January 27 to 31. The event, known as one of the major global toy fairs, attracted attention from players worldwide. Blokees emphasized its dedication to innovation and diversity in its product ecosystem during the exhibition.

data.title: Bitget hires former Bitpanda legal head Oliver Stauber to establish Vienna MiCA hub, aiming for Austria's MiCA approval by mid-2026. Broker-led model with high asset standards for EU users.
data.description: Bitget EU is anticipating approval from Austrian regulators under MiCA by mid-2026. The company has devised a broker-led model with stringent asset requirements tailored for users in Europe.

data.title: US Trade Rep states prompt action if Supreme Court rules against tariffs, replacing them immediately.
data.description: Jamieson Greer, the United States Trade Representative, announced that if the Supreme Court decides against the tariffs, the Trump administration will promptly initiate their replacement.
